samples:
I close my eyes and see
The images that surround me
A time to forget, but I can't seem to get
Through the confusion


My mind is a minefield of emotions
That are out of control

Too strong to be true
So vivid it seems so real
Time will tell
What part of this memory
Is fact and what part fiction?

I can feel the heat growing
Things that shouldn't exist
Filled with dread
This is how they create fear and terror


Imagination creates monsters
Out of things we cannot understand

Too strong to be true
So vivid it seems so real
Time will tell
What part of this memory
Is fact and what part fiction?

Dreams are more vivid than reality
Things that should not exist

Too strong to be true
So vivid it seems so real
Time will tell
What part of this memory
Is fact and what part fiction?

Life comes crashing down on you
When dreams are shattered by reality
Some say that memories can be bought and sold
I don't believe it
It's just a script

I was born and raised in the house of pain
Where I learned to seek revenge
On those who've hurt me with their words
And actions that crush my soul


Every time I think about it, I can feel myself sinking deep inside
My body goes numb as I sink deeper into this dark abyss


Time stands still as I go back through memories of what
Was and what could have been
As I see flashbacks of the abuse I suffered at the hands of my father


Through my mind's eye I see him standing tall
But from my point of view, he seems so small
When you grow up under his spell
You learn to hate your flesh and to rebel


Every time I think about it, I can feel myself sinking deep inside
My body goes numb as I sink deeper into this dark abyss


Time stands still as I go back through memories of what
Was and what could have been
As I see flashbacks of the abuse I suffered at the hands of my father

The end is near
So clear, I see the light
Past and present lay in sight
The future holds no hope at all


Time stands still, how could it go so fast?
Life goes by as quick as the wind
I feel your pain, I know what you're going through
Death of a child is too cruel

Open casket
Life goes on without me
Close my eyes
And pray for those who gave
Their lives to save their son


A thousand miles
I travel across the sea
To be with my son
For those that we don't have
In our lives, we should teach
Our children not to take
Their lives, we should teach

Take your time
Don't be afraid, there's no reason to run
As quick as a flash, you will become
One with your son
In death


Time stands still, how could it go so fast?
Life goes by as quick as the wind
I feel your pain, I know what you're going through
Death of a child is too cruel

The image of the prisoner grows so clear
As he stands erect and faces
His captors, their voices he hears


They are preparing to torture him
With all that is left they'll torture him
When hope seems impossible to have
He will not give it away so easily
Never to be denied his liberty


Human being
Do you hear me call?
Human being
Speak to me at all


Release me from this living hell
Where pain is what I feel so real
I don't belong here, set me free
I can't understand why I'm a prisoner
In this bloody cage called humanity


A mind that could be so much more
Filled with fear, the imagination runs wild
If only people knew what is done
To those who speak out against
This sick twisted world


They are preparing to torture him
With all that is left they'll torture him
When hope seems impossible to have
He will not give it away so easily
Never to be denied his liberty


Human being
Do you hear me call?
Human being
Speak to me at all!

The story of a man and his shadow
Things they say, actions speak louder
To create illusions - a world out of reach
A life filled with obstacles


Obstacles to our true intentions
Set backs that crush our pride


Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering
Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering


Lack of confidence creates self-resentment
Negative thoughts destroy the spirit
Denial of reality leads to self-resentment
Which is worse? Illusion or reality?


Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering
Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering


Fake memories deceive the mind and soul
A life without obstacles
Destiny comes crashing down on dreams
And hope grows thin and disappears


Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering
Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering


Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering
Behind every shadow there is pain
Behind every shadow there's suffering

To write songs
You have to feel the pain
That comes with being born
Into this world of pain


You feel a craving growing inside
Wanting more and more from life
Wishing for a time that never was
To find yourself in another place and time


You seek peace but can't seem to find it
In the midst of all the chaos around
Time and space are your refuge
Where you must learn to understand


The world is ever changing
Never standing still
Things will never be the same
Once they were
Now they're gone


To write songs
You have to feel the pain
That comes with being born
Into this world of pain


In life we suffer, in death we end
On the other side, we'll understand
And when we come back down to earth
We will use our gift for good


To write songs
You have to feel the pain
That comes with being born
Into this world of pain


A door has opened
To a new dimension
Filled with light
Beyond your comprehension

Decapitated head falls from the sky
Eyes are burning out
Acid rains down and corrodes your flesh
Life is ending now


Acid rain - a new hell has begun
Acid rain - no escape or way back in
Acid rain - a new hell has begun
Acid rain - no escape or way back in

Acid rain - no escape or way back in

The words cannot be spoken
They crush your soul with pain
It is written in the stars
And all around you is the void


Out of sight, into the light
A million worlds you'll find
Amongst the stars so bright
You will learn to survive


Live and learn
Life is a test of will
To overcome this world
That would destroy your soul

Life is a journey filled
With obstacles that lie beyond belief
Endurance and commitment are key
To building strength and character


Out of sight, into the light
A million worlds you'll find
Amongst the stars so bright
You will learn to survive

Live and learn
Life is a test of will
To overcome this world
That would destroy your soul


Out of sight, into the light
A million worlds you'll find
Amongst the stars so bright
You will learn to survive
Out of sight, into the light
A million worlds you'll find
Amongst the stars so bright
You will learn to survive

Guilty until proven innocent
So I'll wait and see what comes next


You have no idea of the pain
That I'm going through right now
To find myself lost in this maze of confusion


Speak your mind - what do you think?
About this person that you see
What do you feel - how should I learn?
About this person that you see


I am not to be taken for granted
The end is near - prepare yourself

Sacrificial victim
Left here to rot in sorrow
Sacrificial victim
Your time is up, get ready to die


Never knew my full name
Daughter of a whore
Daughter of a bitch


Speak your mind - what do you think?
About this person that you see
What do you feel - how should I learn?
About this person that you see

Sacrificial victim
Left here to rot in sorrow
Sacrificial victim

The words I write
Are filled with rage and hate
A verbal assault
To destroy what is
An illusion of perfection
Which serves to enslave mankind


It is impossible to escape
This self-inflicted torture
Suffering will be our reward
No mercy will be shown or taken


Fake a smile, pretend you care
Speak my language
Words cannot describe the pain
That my face creates
A twisted version of life
I find hard to believe

Born in a time of misery
Raised by a cruel society
Where emotions are suppressed
And creativity is crushed
